arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Watford - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Popular forward ‘desperate’ to leave Leeds United at the end of this season
arts.sum: Patrick Bamford is keen to leave Leeds United at the end of this season in a bid to find more first-team opportunities, according to former professional scout Mick Brown. Bamford has enjoyed some highs at Elland Road since signing from Middlesbrough in the summer of 2018, netting 16 goals in Leeds’ promotion campaign and 17 goals […] The post Popular forward ‘desperate’ to leave Leeds United at the end of this season appeared first on CaughtOffside.
